title: Centralized Bus Arbitration Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of events and decision points when multiple devices request control of a shared system bus using a central arbiter.
relationships: Devices send Bus Request (BR) to Arbiter
Arbiter prioritizes requests based on a preset algorithm (e.g., priority, round-robin)
Arbiter issues Bus Grant (BG) to the highest priority device
Winning device acknowledges grant and uses the bus
Device releases bus and drops request when finished
